description: 1. 100% cottonThis t-shirt depicts the typical Indian-ness which cannot be found anywhere in the world. This is India and people live in unconditional harmony in this land.Those nice fabrics, the cool colours, the easy and relaxed Fit are few of the things that come to mind when one thinks of t-shirts. Be it little kids, college goers, the not-so-young or the oldies, everybody loves t-shirts. The perfect casual wear ever created by man. So easy to wear and comfortable. The popularity of t-shirts is soaring and it so seems a life without a t-shirt is unthinkable for some. It's a no holds barred addiction people just can't get rid of. The multitude of colours, designs, fits and sizes that t-shirts come in are a tribute to the the astounding craze for t-shirts. The eternal favourite for one and all. Go for your t-shirts right away.
